ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each test cycle */,
  "num_testsuite" INTEGER /* Number of test suites executed in the cycle */,
  "normalized_fpa" REAL /* Normalized function point analysis for the cycle */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the tests in the cycle */,
  "total_failures_in_cycle" INTEGER /* Total number of failures encountered during the cycle */,
  "exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the cycle in seconds */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the test cycle */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test cycle */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value (e.g., 25%, 50%, 75%) */,
  "optimal_failures" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures expected for the threshold */,
  "optimal_exec_time" REAL /* Optimal execution time expected for the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suite_metrics" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "optimal_failures_25" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures expected (25% threshold) */,
  "failures_in_25_ordered" INTEGER /* Count of failures in 25% threshold */,
  "optimal_exec_time_25" REAL /* Optimal execution time expected (25% threshold) */,
  "exec_time_25" REAL /* Actual execution time for 25% threshold */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suite_metrics_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES test_thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cycle_tags" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the test cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_test_cycles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the test cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the testing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failure_analysis" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "optimal_failures_50" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures expected (50% threshold) */,
  "failures_in_50_ordered" INTEGER /* Count of failures in 50% threshold */,
  "optimal_exec_time_50" REAL /* Optimal execution time expected (50% threshold) */,
  "exec_time_50" REAL /* Actual execution time for 50% threshold */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failure_analysis_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES test_thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_failures" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "optimal_failures_75" INTEGER /* Optimal number of failures expected (75% threshold) */,
  "failures_in_75_ordered" INTEGER /* Count of failures in 75% threshold */,
  "optimal_exec_time_75" REAL /* Optimal execution time expected (75% threshold) */,
  "exec_time_75" REAL /* Actual execution time for 75% threshold */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_failures_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES test_thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_metrics" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "prediction_time" REAL /* Time taken for making predictions in seconds */,
  "learning_time" REAL /* Time taken for learning from historical data in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the test executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id", "test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test suite */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test suite was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test case */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_tags" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test case */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_preconditions" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test case */,
  "precondition" TEXT /* Precondition for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "precondition")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_steps" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test case */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_expected_results" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "expected_result")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_actual_results" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "actual_result")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_history" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case executed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test case in seconds */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test case execution */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "executed_at")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES test_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_comments" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_comments" (
  "cycle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated test cycle */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment on the test result or improvement strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id", "user_id")
)
